object: Lean Plan 12 and Stage 9 execution contract
verdict_summary: The reviewed program endpoint is Plan 12 Task 7. The closeout retains the real local, image, live AWS, teardown, and exact-SHA release path while deleting hosted CI, Wardline, fine-grained proof rows, the extra final checkpoint, and parent phase or milestone administration.
non_blocking_residuals: Live AWS execution awaits the approved operator credentials and external Terraform inputs.
repairs_verified: Seven ordered Plan 12 tasks with Task 7 as the endpoint.
Runnable ECR publication, A then B saved-plan apply, live acceptance, independent teardown, and exact-SHA release flow.
Coarse six-phase ledger and hosted-CI-free control manifest.
Retained telemetry completeness before the live phase.
No Wardline execution for this project.
No repository-wide CI-policy sweep or duplicate coverage lane in the AWS integration endpoint.
verification: Plan and runbook Bash fences pass bash -n.
Ruff, format check, strict mypy, JSON parsing, source hashes, and git diff --check pass.

review_history.summary: Plan 12 was reduced to delivery-critical work and independently rechecked after the executable AWS lifecycle was restored to the canonical runbook.
